original_question:
In triangle \(ABC\), the angle bisectors \(AK\) and \(CL\) and the median \(BM\) are drawn. It turns out that \(ML\) is the angle bisector of \(\angle AMB\) and \(MK\) is the angle bisector of \(\angle CMB\). Find the angles of triangle \(ABC\).

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
